headline: Will WEC Energy (WEC) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: WEC Energy (WEC) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: FirstEnergy Sees Revenue Growth in Q1, Earnings Match Estimates
summary: FE's first-quarter revenues have risen 10.5% to $4.2B, core EPS met estimates and the Energize365 capital plan of $36B for 2026-2030 and full-year guidance are reaffirmed.

headline: Eversource Energy (ES) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
